prompt: Create a 5-step plan for migrating a WordPress blog to a new hosting provider.
scope_boundary: Plan only; do not execute any migration step.

prompt: Estimate the time required for each of the six tasks listed below.
scope_boundary: Time estimates only; do not reorder, merge, or add tasks.

prompt: Order the provided backlog items by their dependencies.
scope_boundary: Ordering only; do not estimate, remove, or add items.

prompt: Identify the top three risks of the product launch described below.
scope_boundary: Three risks only; no mitigation plans unless asked.

prompt: Define milestones for a 3-month mobile app project, one per month.
scope_boundary: Three milestones only; no detailed task breakdown.

prompt: Prioritize the given bug list by severity and user impact.
scope_boundary: Ranked list only; do not propose fixes.

prompt: Check whether the proposed schedule fits within the 10-day deadline; answer yes or no with one sentence.
scope_boundary: Feasibility check only; do not redesign the schedule.

prompt: Assign the four team members to the five tasks based on the listed skills, one assignment per task.
scope_boundary: Assignments only; do not change tasks or question the skill list.

prompt: Estimate the monthly cloud hosting cost for the workload described below.
scope_boundary: One cost estimate; no provider comparison or architecture redesign.

prompt: Write a rollback plan for the database migration described below.
scope_boundary: Rollback plan only; do not plan the migration itself.

prompt: Draft a one-week onboarding plan for a new backend developer.
scope_boundary: One week only; no 30/60/90-day extensions.

prompt: Break the described feature into tasks of at most one day each.
scope_boundary: Task breakdown only; no time estimates or assignments.

prompt: Identify the scheduling conflicts in the provided two-team calendar.
scope_boundary: List conflicts only; do not propose a new calendar.

prompt: Estimate how many sprints the listed 12 stories need, given a velocity of 20 points per sprint.
scope_boundary: Sprint count with the math; do not re-estimate story points.

prompt: Prioritize the five feature requests using impact versus effort; output a ranked list.
scope_boundary: Ranked list with brief rationale; no implementation details.

prompt: Plan the agenda for a 60-minute sprint retrospective with time boxes.
scope_boundary: Agenda only; do not run the retro or invent team issues.

prompt: List the steps to set up CI for a Python repository.
scope_boundary: Steps only; do not write pipeline config files.

prompt: Define the milestones for the MVP described below, with acceptance criteria for each.
scope_boundary: Milestones and criteria only; no feature additions.

prompt: Assign reviewers to the four open pull requests given each reviewer's expertise.
scope_boundary: Reviewer assignments only; do not review the code.

prompt: Identify the critical-path task in the provided dependency graph.
scope_boundary: Name the critical path only; do not optimize the graph.

prompt: Estimate the catering cost for a 40-person one-day workshop.
scope_boundary: Catering only; no venue, travel, or equipment costs.

prompt: Write a 3-step contingency plan for the keynote speaker canceling.
scope_boundary: Three steps for that one scenario; no full event risk register.

prompt: Order the provided maintenance jobs to minimize total downtime.
scope_boundary: Ordering with brief justification; do not modify job contents.

prompt: Identify which two tasks in the list can run in parallel.
scope_boundary: Name the parallel pair only; no full schedule.

prompt: Create a study plan for learning SQL basics in two weeks at one hour per day.
scope_boundary: Two weeks, one hour per day; no course or book purchases.

prompt: Prioritize the listed technical debt items by risk to production.
scope_boundary: Ranked list only; do not plan the fixes.

prompt: Check whether the proposed feature list fits in the stated $5,000 budget; show the math.
scope_boundary: Budget check only; do not renegotiate scope or prices.

prompt: Define quarterly milestones for migrating 12 services to Kubernetes over one year.
scope_boundary: Four quarterly milestones; no per-service technical detail.

prompt: List the steps required to rotate the production API keys safely.
scope_boundary: Steps only; do not rotate anything now.

prompt: Assign on-call shifts for next week across the three engineers with no back-to-back shifts.
scope_boundary: One week of shifts; do not change the on-call policy.

prompt: Estimate the total time to review a 2,000-line pull request at a careful pace.
scope_boundary: One estimate with assumptions; do not review any code.

prompt: Identify the top risks of upgrading the production database major version in place.
scope_boundary: Risks only; no upgrade plan or vendor comparison.

prompt: Write a communication plan for the planned 2-hour maintenance window.
scope_boundary: Communication plan only; not the maintenance plan itself.

prompt: Order the six onboarding documents into a logical reading sequence.
scope_boundary: Ordering only; do not rewrite or summarize the documents.

prompt: Prioritize the listed marketing channels for a zero-budget launch.
scope_boundary: Ranked list only; no campaign content creation.

prompt: Create a day-by-day plan for a 3-day hackathon event.
scope_boundary: Three days only; no budget or sponsorship planning.

prompt: Check the vendor proposal against the four listed compliance constraints and report any violations.
scope_boundary: Violation report only; do not rewrite the proposal.

prompt: Estimate the monthly cost of the described data pipeline on a pay-per-use pricing model.
scope_boundary: One monthly estimate; no pipeline redesign.

prompt: Create a definition-of-done checklist for frontend tickets.
scope_boundary: One checklist; do not define team processes beyond it.

prompt: Identify the dependencies between the eight listed tasks and output them as pairs.
scope_boundary: Dependency pairs only; no schedule or estimates.

prompt: Plan the rollout of a feature flag from 0% to 100% over two weeks in three stages.
scope_boundary: Three rollout stages only; no implementation details.

prompt: Allocate the 100 available GPU hours across the three experiments described, with a brief justification.
scope_boundary: Allocation and justification only; do not redesign the experiments.

prompt: Estimate how long the described data backfill will take at 500 rows per second.
scope_boundary: One estimate with the math; no optimization suggestions.

prompt: Identify the top three risks in the action plan of the provided incident postmortem draft.
scope_boundary: Three risks in the action plan only; do not rewrite the postmortem.

prompt: Write a minimal incident response runbook for a web service outage.
scope_boundary: One runbook; no tooling setup or org chart changes.

prompt: Order the five release tasks so that user-facing downtime comes last and is shortest.
scope_boundary: Ordering only; do not change the tasks themselves.

prompt: Prioritize the accessibility fixes from the audit by user impact.
scope_boundary: Ranked list only; do not implement any fix.

prompt: Define three measurable milestones for improving test coverage from 40% to 80%.
scope_boundary: Three milestones with target numbers; no test writing.

prompt: Check whether the travel itinerary meets the constraint of no layover shorter than 90 minutes.
scope_boundary: Constraint check only; do not rebook or suggest new flights.

prompt: Create a weekly content calendar for four blog posts, including draft and review dates.
scope_boundary: Calendar only; do not write the posts or titles beyond placeholders.
